dashboard.title: Developer-first control surface for authoring, runs, attention handling, and config provenance.
dashboard.subtitle: All views are derived from the same canonical workflow spec. No more second sources from graph, cards, or debug panels.

authoring.title: Create or revise a workflow draft
authoring.body: Continue a session, inspect revisions, edit raw spec, and publish only when lint passes.

catalog.title: Inspect registered versions
catalog.body: Browse cards, graph, spec, and lint from one canonical workflow version.

workspace.title: Trace callbacks, artifacts, and rounds
workspace.body: Use the run workspace to inspect node rounds, context payloads, and intervention actions.

settings.title: See resolved config provenance
settings.body: Compare the effective command templates, storage paths, and runtime guard defaults.

sidebar.title: Pipeliner
sidebar.subtitle: Workflow Studio
sidebar.description: Inspect workflow specs, author drafts, debug runs, and track resolved config.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Resolved configuration + provenance
settings.description: Developers can see the current effective values and whether they come from 'default' or 'env'.

labels.claudeTraceHint: Controls whether Claude output logs are retained and displayed.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the interface.

authoring.title: Authoring
authoring.subtitle: Conversation + canonical draft
authoring.description: Intent brief, revision history, raw spec and publish gate are all in one workspace.

help.newSession: Create a new authoring session to produce a workflow draft.
help.sessionTitle: Human-readable name to identify this session.
help.intentBrief: One-sentence goal with inputs/outputs and acceptance criteria.
help.instruction: Describe what to change or refine in the current draft.
help.canonicalSpec: This is the only canonical source. All views derive from this JSON.
help.messages: System messages and publish events for this session.
help.revisionHistory: Each save/continue creates a new revision you can revisit.

inputs.title: Workflow inputs
inputs.description: Configure structured input metadata and keep it synchronized with the canonical spec.
inputs.empty: No workflow inputs yet. Add one to define the run-start contract.
inputs.invalidRawSpec: Workflow input controls are unavailable until the raw spec becomes valid JSON.

empty.selectSession: Create or select a session from the left first.
empty.workspaceHint: Select a session to view synchronized cards / graph / spec / lint views.

workflows.title: Workflows
workflows.description: Select a version to enter the cards / graph / spec / lint synchronized workspace.
workflows.selectVersionHint: Select a version to enter the cards / graph / spec / lint workspace.
workflows.runInputsFormHint: Use the structured form generated from workflow input metadata.
workflows.runInputsRawHint: Use raw JSON when you need to bypass or override the structured form.
workflows.runInputsEmpty: This workflow does not declare any inputs. You can still launch the run with an empty payload.
workflows.uploadCsvHint: Each row becomes one run. Runs execute sequentially.
workflows.jsonObjectRequired: Input must be a JSON object
workflows.filePathHint: Manual local path entry is kept plain so the same value can be reused for batch launches.
workflows.iterateHint: Create a new authoring session from this published version.

runs.title: Runs

focus.title: Current Focus
focus.queued: This round is queued and waiting for the next dispatch to start.
focus.empty: No active node round is available right now.

graph.title: Run Graph
graph.description: Use the workflow graph as the single source of truth for live node status. Click a node to inspect its latest round.

detail.title: Node Detail
detail.emptyDescription: Select a node in the graph to inspect its run details.
detail.viewingHistorical: You are viewing a non-current node
detail.waitingValidator: Executor finished. Waiting for the validator to start.

runs.noArtifactsInRound: No artifacts published in this round.
runs.noLogsInRound: No logs recorded for this round.
runs.callbacksEmpty: No callbacks recorded for this round.

drive.title: Auto drive
drive.description: Dispatch nodes in order until terminal state or max steps.
drive.runningDescription: Auto-drive is already running for this run.
drive.invalidSteps: Max steps must be a positive integer
drive.disabledWhileRunning: Manual drive is disabled while another driver is running.

preview.title: Artifact / Log Preview
preview.truncated: Preview truncated at {limit} bytes. Use the workspace path to open the full file.

runs.noAttentionNodes: No attention nodes at the moment.

batchRuns.title: Batch Runs
batchRuns.empty: No rows found in this batch.
batchRuns.autoRefresh: Auto-refreshing while this batch is still active.

attention.title: Attention Queue
attention.iterateHint: Start an authoring session from an attention run to refine the workflow.
